title: Data storage & dataset API modernization
description:
Modernize data storage and dataset access for scalable deep learning workflows.

Scope:
- Evaluate HDF5 alternatives or a more robust HDF5 schema (versioned, metadata-forward).
- Add DataContainer subset/random sampling APIs and explicit subset selection.
- Handle empty/partial files gracefully during reads and preprocessing.
- Standardize metadata fields and alignment checks across specs/projections/features.
- Add tests covering empty/missing inputs and subset sampling.

title: Assess HDF5 storage + migration plan
description:
Audit current HDF5 usage and propose a versioned schema or alternative storage format.

Deliverables:
- Inventory of current datasets/fields written/read.
- Recommendation on HDF5 schema hardening vs alternative (e.g., Zarr).
- Migration/compatibility notes and risks.

title: DataContainer subset/random sampling API
description:
Add explicit subset selection and random sampling helpers to DataContainer.

Scope:
- Request specific file subsets and random subsets by count/seed.
- Update docs/examples showing usage.
- Add unit tests for deterministic sampling.

title: Harden IO for empty/missing files
description:
Make IO resilient to empty/partial files across data and preprocessing.

Scope:
- Guard empty segment/feature files in loaders/readers.
- Ensure preprocessing returns consistent flags for invalid segments.
- Replace hard asserts/quit with controlled errors or skips.
- Add regression tests for empty files.

title: Metadata alignment & validation utilities
description:
Standardize metadata fields and add alignment checks for specs/projections/features.

Scope:
- Define canonical field set and naming (audio_filenames, onsets, offsets, etc.).
- Add validation helper for file alignment and dataset lengths.
- Use in DataContainer projection writes/reads.

title: Data IO tests for edge cases
description:
Add tests for DataContainer and preprocessing edge cases.

Scope:
- Empty segment/ROI/feature files.
- Missing projection files.
- Subset sampling determinism.
- Metadata alignment validation.

title: Preprocessing & warping refactor
description:
Refactor preprocessing/warping to remove legacy dependencies and simplify the pipeline.

Scope:
- Replace affinewarp usage with ava.preprocessing.warping.
- Consolidate get_spec implementations and clarify validation semantics.
- Simplify preprocessing utilities and parameter handling.
- Improve performance in segmentation/preprocessing loops.
- Update docs/examples to match the new pipeline.

title: Replace affinewarp with ava.preprocessing.warping
description:
Remove affinewarp dependency by routing warping workflows through ava.preprocessing.warping.

Scope:
- Update models/utils and window_vae_dataset.
- Adjust parameter search helpers if needed.
- Remove affinewarp from dependencies/docs.

title: Unify get_spec implementations + validation semantics
description:
Consolidate get_spec behavior across preprocessing and segmenting utilities.

Scope:
- Decide single validation/flag semantics for invalid segments.
- Update call sites (preprocess/segment/window datasets).
- Add tests covering invalid segments and short audio.

title: Segmentation/preprocessing performance pass
description:
Improve performance in segmentation/preprocessing loops.

Scope:
- Reduce redundant file IO and per-segment overhead.
- Consider file-by-file processing and batching.
- Document any speedups and tradeoffs.

title: Docs/examples update for preprocessing pipeline
description:
Update docs and examples to reflect the refactored preprocessing/warping pipeline.

Scope:
- docs/source/preprocess.rst and related pages.
- examples/* preprocessing and segmentation usage.

title: Modernize packaging and project layout
description: Move to pyproject.toml + src layout, define extras, and align packaging with modern standards (PEP 517/518). Use conda environment files for reproducible dev/train envs. Backward compatibility not required.

title: Model/training API & naming cleanup
description:
Align model APIs and naming with the modernized training stack.

Scope:
- Rename window VAE to shotgun VAE across code, docs, and examples.
- Normalize dataset/module naming and public imports.
- Provide config-driven training entrypoints around Lightning with reproducible settings.
- Ensure checkpoint compatibility and metrics logging parity.
- Add/update tests for training entrypoints and dataset wiring.

title: Rename window VAE to shotgun VAE
description:
Rename window VAE terminology across code, docs, and examples.

Scope:
- Rename modules/classes/files where appropriate.
- Update docs/source and examples.
- Keep imports backward-compatible if feasible (or add migration notes).

title: Public API/import cleanup
description:
Normalize public imports and naming in ava/* packages.

Scope:
- Make subpackage imports explicit and consistent.
- Remove or deprecate ambiguous imports.
- Update docs to reflect new import paths.

title: Config-driven Lightning training entrypoint
description:
Provide a reproducible training entrypoint for Lightning with config files.

Scope:
- Define config schema (YAML/TOML) for model/data/trainer.
- Add CLI or script entrypoint to launch runs.
- Ensure outputs (checkpoints/plots/metrics) match legacy expectations.

title: Checkpoint compatibility + metric parity tests
description:
Verify Lightning training maintains parity with legacy VAE training.

Scope:
- Checkpoint load/save compatibility.
- Compare ELBO/recon metrics on a small fixture.
- Add tests or validation scripts.

title: Update training examples to new API
description:
Refresh examples to use the modernized training entrypoints and naming.

Scope:
- examples/* training scripts.
- Documentation snippets in README/docs.

title: Visualization & media export modernization
description:
Refresh plotting and media export tooling for reliability and quality.

Scope:
- Set 1:1 aspect ratio for tooltip plots.
- Replace ffmpeg dependency in shotgun_movie with MoviePy.
- Standardize plot output paths and formats.
- Add example-based regression checks for key plots.

title: Tooltip plot aspect ratio fix
description:
Set 1:1 aspect ratio for tooltip plots and verify visual layout.

Scope:
- Update ava.plotting.tooltip_plot.
- Add a small example or test to confirm aspect ratio.

title: Replace ffmpeg dependency with MoviePy
description:
Switch shotgun_movie video export to MoviePy to avoid ffmpeg dependency management issues.

Scope:
- Update ava.plotting.shotgun_movie.
- Update requirements/docs.
- Verify output parity on a sample input.

title: Standardize plot output paths/formats
description:
Standardize plotting output locations and file formats across ava.plotting.

Scope:
- Centralize default output path logic.
- Ensure consistent PDF/PNG defaults and naming.
- Update docs/examples.

title: Plot regression checks
description:
Add lightweight regression checks for key plots.

Scope:
- Create small fixture data.
- Verify plot generation succeeds and outputs expected size/metadata.
- Keep tests fast and optional if needed.

description: Define and implement early stopping criteria (e.g., val ELBO plateau, reconstruction quality, posterior collapse checks) as Lightning callbacks/config.
